response.global_analysis: Dialogue-heavy segment from a VTuber stream featuring Shiori Novella, Nerissa Ravencroft, and Koseki Bijou (Biboo) playing a 'Fukuwarai' game directed by Pokey. No vocal music detected. Transcribed and translated (transcription only as the audio is English) the dialogue, ensuring timestamps match the vocal waveforms. Used on-screen text to confirm Pokey's lines and game instructions. Split long sentences to stay under the 50-character limit.

subtitles.original: Oh, they're so cute! Wait a second...
subtitles.english: Oh, they're so cute! Wait a second...

subtitles.original: Yeah...
subtitles.english: Yeah...

subtitles.original: Wait, those voices coming from... from the dogs?
subtitles.english: Wait, those voices coming from... from the dogs?

subtitles.original: I think this might be FuwaMoco!
subtitles.english: I think this might be FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: What? Wait, Nerissa! FuwaMoco have been turned...
subtitles.english: What? Wait, Nerissa! FuwaMoco have been turned...

subtitles.original: ...into Dobermans?!
subtitles.english: ...into Dobermans?!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Are you guys okay?
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Are you guys okay?

subtitles.original: Yeah, you know, I think they actually look more...
subtitles.english: Yeah, you know, I think they actually look more...

subtitles.original: ...like hellhounds like this, so it kind of fits.
subtitles.english: ...like hellhounds like this, so it kind of fits.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Oh, they're so cute! So cute!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Oh, they're so cute! So cute!

subtitles.original: Yeah, give them a big pet.
subtitles.english: Yeah, give them a big pet.

subtitles.original: Yes, yes, good dog! You're a good girl, aren't you?
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, good dog! You're a good girl, aren't you?

subtitles.original: Yeah, good girl! Good girl!
subtitles.english: Yeah, good girl! Good girl!

subtitles.original: But wait, why... why are they Dobermans...
subtitles.english: But wait, why... why are they Dobermans...

subtitles.original: ...all of a sudden? What happened?
subtitles.english: ...all of a sudden? What happened?

subtitles.original: Hahaha! Pokey! Pokey!
subtitles.english: Hahaha! Pokey! Pokey!

subtitles.original: Hehehe! Not so fluffy and fuzzy now, hoeh!
subtitles.english: Hehehe! Not so fluffy and fuzzy now, hoeh!

subtitles.original: Pokey, change us back now!
subtitles.english: Pokey, change us back now!

subtitles.original: We can't eat donuts like this!
subtitles.english: We can't eat donuts like this!

subtitles.original: THAT's why you wanna turn back? Hmph, whatever.
subtitles.english: THAT's why you wanna turn back? Hmph, whatever.

subtitles.original: I'll give you one final trial! Clear it...
subtitles.english: I'll give you one final trial! Clear it...

subtitles.original: ...and I'll restore them!
subtitles.english: ...and I'll restore them!

subtitles.original: Mococo-chan, do this so we can go back to normal!
subtitles.english: Mococo-chan, do this so we can go back to normal!

subtitles.original: Okay! Everybody, help us, please!
subtitles.english: Okay! Everybody, help us, please!

subtitles.original: I... I guess we'll give you one donut for the rescue.
subtitles.english: I... I guess we'll give you one donut for the rescue.

subtitles.original: Eh? Just one donut? One each or share it?
subtitles.english: Eh? Just one donut? One each or share it?

subtitles.original: Eh? But I kind of like you like this, though.
subtitles.english: Eh? But I kind of like you like this, though.

subtitles.original: Well, Pokey, what kind of challenge...
subtitles.english: Well, Pokey, what kind of challenge...

subtitles.original: ...are you going to give us today?
subtitles.english: ...are you going to give us today?

subtitles.original: FUWAMOCO Fukuwarai!
subtitles.english: FUWAMOCO Fukuwarai!

subtitles.original: FuwaMoco Fukuwarai? Eh?
subtitles.english: FuwaMoco Fukuwarai? Eh?

subtitles.original: Behold, the challenge before you!
subtitles.english: Behold, the challenge before you!

subtitles.original: Eh? Oh, the carpet has changed! Wow...
subtitles.english: Eh? Oh, the carpet has changed! Wow...

subtitles.original: ...why do they have no faces? That's kind of scary.
subtitles.english: ...why do they have no faces? That's kind of scary.

subtitles.original: Yeah, it is a little freaky. I like it.
subtitles.english: Yeah, it is a little freaky. I like it.

subtitles.original: Hehe, ever heard of Fukuwarai?
subtitles.english: Hehe, ever heard of Fukuwarai?

subtitles.original: It's this old-school Japanese game —
subtitles.english: It's this old-school Japanese game —

subtitles.original: lemme show you how it's played.
subtitles.english: lemme show you how it's played.

subtitles.original: See those two giant faces?
subtitles.english: See those two giant faces?

subtitles.original: Their face parts are all scattered around.
subtitles.english: Their face parts are all scattered around.

subtitles.original: Bijou and Shiori will be blindfolded...
subtitles.english: Bijou and Shiori will be blindfolded...

subtitles.original: ...and carry the face parts!
subtitles.english: ...and carry the face parts!

subtitles.original: Blindfolded? Oh, nice! Oh yeah...
subtitles.english: Blindfolded? Oh, nice! Oh yeah...

subtitles.original: ...actually that sounds like fun.
subtitles.english: ...actually that sounds like fun.

subtitles.original: We don't have to do anything.
subtitles.english: We don't have to do anything.

subtitles.original: Big bird, with your words alone, you must guide them.
subtitles.english: Big bird, with your words alone, you must guide them.

subtitles.original: Lead them to place each piece...
subtitles.english: Lead them to place each piece...

subtitles.original: ...and restore FUWAMOCO's face!
subtitles.english: ...and restore FUWAMOCO's face!

subtitles.original: Me? Yeah, you.
subtitles.english: Me? Yeah, you.

subtitles.original: Well, we're just going to be over here blindfolded.
subtitles.english: Well, we're just going to be over here blindfolded.

subtitles.original: We're just going to chill. Good luck!
subtitles.english: We're just going to chill. Good luck!

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll do my best! No pressure! No pressure!
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll do my best! No pressure! No pressure!

subtitles.original: Yeah, it's all up to you!
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's all up to you!

subtitles.original: You've got 5 minutes. Better make it count!
subtitles.english: You've got 5 minutes. Better make it count!

subtitles.original: Okay, let's all say FuwaMoco together!
subtitles.english: Okay, let's all say FuwaMoco together!

subtitles.original: Or not... or not! Let's do this!
subtitles.english: Or not... or not! Let's do this!

subtitles.original: Let's go!
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: All right, ladies. So first plan of action:
subtitles.english: All right, ladies. So first plan of action:

subtitles.original: Come on over, one on each side of me, pretty please.
subtitles.english: Come on over, one on each side of me, pretty please.

subtitles.original: Okay.
subtitles.english: Okay.

subtitles.original: And then I would like you to turn around.
subtitles.english: And then I would like you to turn around.

subtitles.original: Oh, okay.
subtitles.english: Oh, okay.

subtitles.original: So, I have prepared for you blindfolds,
subtitles.english: So, I have prepared for you blindfolds,

subtitles.original: so I'm going to go ahead and just—
subtitles.english: so I'm going to go ahead and just—

subtitles.original: You feel free to adjust them as you'd like, but...
subtitles.english: You feel free to adjust them as you'd like, but...

subtitles.original: ...that way you won't be able to see anything...
subtitles.english: ...that way you won't be able to see anything...

subtitles.original: ...since I have to direct you.
subtitles.english: ...since I have to direct you.

subtitles.original: So go ahead and turn back around.
subtitles.english: So go ahead and turn back around.

subtitles.original: Ha! I cannot see a thing.
subtitles.english: Ha! I cannot see a thing.

subtitles.original: Yes, perfect. That's exactly what we want. Aha!
subtitles.english: Yes, perfect. That's exactly what we want. Aha!

subtitles.original: All right, and then we're going to go ahead...
subtitles.english: All right, and then we're going to go ahead...

subtitles.original: ...and start placing these things.
subtitles.english: ...and start placing these things.

subtitles.original: So FuwaMoco, my puppies, I'll do my best for you...
subtitles.english: So FuwaMoco, my puppies, I'll do my best for you...

subtitles.original: ...okay? Do your best, Nerissa! Let's do this!
subtitles.english: ...okay? Do your best, Nerissa! Let's do this!

subtitles.original: Let's do it! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: Let's do it! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: Okay, and start!
subtitles.english: Okay, and start!

subtitles.original: Okay. So what I'm going to do is...
subtitles.english: Okay. So what I'm going to do is...

subtitles.original: ...I'm going to hand you guys each a piece...
subtitles.english: ...I'm going to hand you guys each a piece...

subtitles.original: ...and then I'm going to tell you where to go.
subtitles.english: ...and then I'm going to tell you where to go.

subtitles.original: Who goes first then?
subtitles.english: Who goes first then?

subtitles.original: So you're each going to do one face. Okay? Okay.
subtitles.english: So you're each going to do one face. Okay? Okay.

subtitles.original: So, you're going to start that way. Wait, where am I?
subtitles.english: So, you're going to start that way. Wait, where am I?

subtitles.original: Whoa, what? Where am I? What's this?
subtitles.english: Whoa, what? Where am I? What's this?

subtitles.original: Shiori's just grabbing...
subtitles.english: Shiori's just grabbing...

subtitles.original: ...I don't know what I just grabbed.
subtitles.english: ...I don't know what I just grabbed.

subtitles.original: Okay. So, Shiori, walk to me.
subtitles.english: Okay. So, Shiori, walk to me.

subtitles.original: Just walk to the sound of my voice.
subtitles.english: Just walk to the sound of my voice.

subtitles.original: I'm coming. This is really slow.
subtitles.english: I'm coming. This is really slow.

subtitles.original: Yeah, this way, this way. Walk towards me.
subtitles.english: Yeah, this way, this way. Walk towards me.

subtitles.original: Okay, okay. Walk towards me.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. Walk towards me.

subtitles.original: Okay. If I accidentally grab something, I'm sorry.
subtitles.english: Okay. If I accidentally grab something, I'm sorry.

subtitles.original: Okay, grab onto this. This?
subtitles.english: Okay, grab onto this. This?

subtitles.original: Yes.
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: Okay. Don't move. Okay. Okay.
subtitles.english: Okay. Don't move. Okay. Okay.

subtitles.original: Don't move! Biboo, I want you to walk...
subtitles.english: Don't move! Biboo, I want you to walk...

subtitles.original: ...to the sound of my voice, okay?
subtitles.english: ...to the sound of my voice, okay?

subtitles.original: Where is the sound of your voice?
subtitles.english: Where is the sound of your voice?

subtitles.original: Right here. The sound of my voice!
subtitles.english: Right here. The sound of my voice!

subtitles.original: Where is 'here'?
subtitles.english: Where is 'here'?

subtitles.original: Right, your right. Your right.
subtitles.english: Right, your right. Your right.

subtitles.original: Okay, just a little right.
subtitles.english: Okay, just a little right.

subtitles.original: Okay, forward.
subtitles.english: Okay, forward.

subtitles.original: Quickly! Okay, now come to me.
subtitles.english: Quickly! Okay, now come to me.

subtitles.original: Where is you? Okay.
subtitles.english: Where is you? Okay.

subtitles.original: So, I want you to grab this. Oh, okay, I got it. Yes.
subtitles.english: So, I want you to grab this. Oh, okay, I got it. Yes.

subtitles.original: So, pretty much where you are right now...
subtitles.english: So, pretty much where you are right now...

subtitles.original: ...not you, Shiori.
subtitles.english: ...not you, Shiori.

subtitles.original: Okay, Shiori, come forward a little bit.
subtitles.english: Okay, Shiori, come forward a little bit.

subtitles.original: This forward or this forward?
subtitles.english: This forward or this forward?

subtitles.original: The forward towards me. This forward?
subtitles.english: The forward towards me. This forward?

subtitles.original: Okay, that's too much. Back up just a little bit.
subtitles.english: Okay, that's too much. Back up just a little bit.

subtitles.original: And then I want you to move your right.
subtitles.english: And then I want you to move your right.

subtitles.original: Your right. Right? This is right.
subtitles.english: Your right. Right? This is right.

subtitles.original: Left? Left! Okay, back up.
subtitles.english: Left? Left! Okay, back up.

subtitles.original: Oh, Mococo-chan, I don't know...
subtitles.english: Oh, Mococo-chan, I don't know...

subtitles.original: ...if this is going to work out!
subtitles.english: ...if this is going to work out!

subtitles.original: Place it down.
subtitles.english: Place it down.

subtitles.original: I tried to be strong but now I'm regretting that.
subtitles.english: I tried to be strong but now I'm regretting that.

subtitles.original: Okay. Place it down, Biboo.
subtitles.english: Okay. Place it down, Biboo.

subtitles.original: Ah, down? Oh, okay.
subtitles.english: Ah, down? Oh, okay.
